query: CREATE TABLE member_bonus_payments (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, distribution_id INT NOT NULL, founding_member_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, payment_method VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'check', payment_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending', payment_reference VARCHAR(100), paid_at BIGINT, blockchain_hash VARCHAR(64), created_at BIGINT);
